# Cheeko

> Cheeko is an AI-powered companion device for children, offering multilingual conversation, stories, learning games, Cheeko Card interactions, and parent-controlled play.

Cheeko helps families choose between Cheeko Pro and Cheeko Basic. The site explains the device experience, product differences, safety position, specifications, and waitlist path.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Cheeko, the product story, feature narrative, device options, comparison, safety, specifications, FAQs, and waitlist call to action.
- [Product Section](/#product): Cheeko Pro and Cheeko Basic product cards, pricing, availability, and core feature lists.
- [Compare Section](/#compare): Side-by-side comparison of Cheeko Basic and Cheeko Pro.
- [Safety Section](/#safety): Parent controls, child-friendly design, and safety-focused positioning.
- [Specifications Section](/#specs): Device specifications and product details.
- [FAQ Section](/#faq): Common questions about Cheeko, language support, play modes, and purchase details.
- [Waitlist Section](/#waitlist): Call to action for joining the Cheeko Pro waitlist.

## Product Summary

- [Cheeko Pro](/#product): Screen-enabled Cheeko companion with fox assistant interface, Cheeko Cards, multilingual support, kids radio, educational games, offline-ready library, and Parent App controls.
- [Cheeko Basic](/#product): Audio-first Cheeko companion for screen-free play, Cheeko Cards, multilingual play, and Parent App controls.

## Important Context

- Cheeko Pro price shown on the site: Rs. 4,990.
- Cheeko Basic price shown on the site: Rs. 3,990.
- Launch offer shown on the site: 20% off with code FIRSTUSER.
- The product language emphasizes child-friendly companionship, phone-free play, multilingual Indian families, and parent control.
